executive_summary: Today's sourcing yielded 10 signals above our threshold, with a strong emphasis on India (7 signals) compared to SEA (3 signals). The most prevalent archetype observed is founders entering stealth mode, though specific L1/L2 titles or prior exit history are not yet clearly corroborated for most. Pranav Sharma, heading into stealth in India's Travel & Hospitality sector, presents a potentially compelling lead given the sector's dynamism, alongside the stealth entry in India's E-commerce/Quick Commerce space which warrants further investigation.

persons.name: Pranav Sharma
persons.investment_thesis: Pranav Sharma is the founder of The Hosteller, a backpacker hostel chain in India. While this indicates domain expertise in the travel and hospitality sector, there is no clear signal of him building a new venture. Further investigation is needed to determine if he is a seasoned operator looking to start something new or if this is simply a quote about a past success.

signals.description: [YourStory] In five years, backpacker hostels will be the first choice for India’s young travellers: The Hosteller founder

key_strengths: Founder of a company in the travel/hospitality sector (The Hosteller)
risks: Experience years unknown
Not a second-time founder
No clear signal of a new venture being built
Headline is a quote about a past venture, not a current stealth signal

persons.name: Dave Ng
persons.investment_thesis: Dave Ng has departed from Altara, a signal that he may be pursuing a new venture. While the exact nature of his next step is unclear, his departure from a known entity warrants further investigation to understand his background and potential new company. We need to confirm his experience level and if he is indeed building something new.

signals.description: [e27] “The risk doesn’t go away; execution decides everything”: Altara’s Dave Ng

key_strengths: Executive departure from a known entity (Altara)
risks: Experience years unknown
Second-time founder status is false
No clear signal of a new company being built
Headline is a quote, not a direct announcement of a new venture

persons.name: Unknown
persons.investment_thesis: This signal points to a potentially high-caliber executive leaving Amazon, a leader in e-commerce and logistics, to potentially build a new venture in the quick-commerce space. The scale of the reported investment suggests significant strategic responsibility. Further investigation is needed to identify the individual and confirm their entrepreneurial intent.

signals.description: [YourStory] Amazon to take ‘Now’ quick-commerce service to 100 cities at Rs 2,800 Cr investment

key_strengths: News report indicates a significant executive departure from Amazon related to a major investment in quick commerce.
The scale of the investment (Rs 2,800 Cr) suggests a high-level executive was involved in strategic planning and execution.
risks: Founder identity is unknown, making it difficult to assess experience, track record, and previous exits.
No direct confirmation of a new company registration or stealth venture.
Experience level is unknown.

persons.name: Unknown
persons.investment_thesis: This signal points to a founder actively building in the women's reproductive rights space in India, evidenced by the opening of a flagship center. While the founder's background and entrepreneurial track record are currently unknown, the domain focus and tangible progress warrant further investigation to understand their experience and potential for building a scalable venture.

signals.description: [YourStory] Advancing women’s reproductive rights; CENT opens flagship centre in Bengaluru

key_strengths: Focus on a critical social issue (women's reproductive rights)
Established a physical center (flagship centre in Bengaluru)
risks: Founder identity and experience are unknown
Lack of clear business model or commercialization strategy indicated
Limited information on previous entrepreneurial experience

persons.name: Unknown
persons.investment_thesis: The headline suggests a founder building in the burgeoning AI agents space, potentially leveraging technology to enable solopreneurs. While the founder's background is currently unknown, the strong sector focus and intriguing thesis warrant further investigation to uncover their experience and previous ventures.

signals.description: [e27] The one-person company was always possible. AI agents make it probable

key_strengths: Stealth headline indicating focus on AI agents and the 'one-person company' concept
risks: Founder identity and experience are unknown
Previous company and title are unknown
Geography is unknown
No corroborating registration or previous exit data

persons.name: Unknown
